synopsis:
From Darth Vader to Kylo Ren to Boba Fett, what makes a Star Wars villain? Insider asks a panel of experts what the key ingredients of a Star Wars bad guy are! Plus: The making of the stunning Naboo Royal starship from The Phantom Menace.
Plus, Alan Dean Foster discusses his novelization of Star Wars: The Force Awakens, and an all-new exclusive fiction!
title: Insider #164
